hero.heading: About this family history project
hero.lede: A continuing project to gather, verify and share the history of the Byrne family — names, places, photographs and the stories behind them.

body: This site collects what we know about the Byrne line and the families it has joined to over four generations. Every person card links to source documents — birth certificates, parish records, ship manifests — so anyone can check the working.
It is a work in progress. New names, photographs and corrections are added regularly. If you spot something missing or wrong, get in touch.
